tierLineSuffix: plan · up to {cap} photos · {days} days of storage

banners.paidLive: Payment confirmed. Your event is live.
banners.paidDraftPre: Payment received — finalising. Refresh in a moment if the status does not change to
banners.freeLimit: You already have an active free event. End it first, or upgrade this one to Basic or Gold.

paywall.heading: Activate your event
paywall.lead: Complete payment to open the event. As soon as it goes through, you'll get access to the QR pack, photo wall and uploads.

runGuide.heading: How to run your event
runGuide.payDesc: The Stripe payment makes the event live and opens uploads.
runGuide.qrDesc: Print the A4 sign + 8 table cards with code {code}.
runGuide.screenDesc: Show photos on the big screen — {url}.
runGuide.scanDescScreen: Photos appear instantly on the screen.
runGuide.scanDescCollection: Photos appear instantly in the collection.
runGuide.afterDesc: Download all photos as a zip — you and guests who provided an email get a link.

dateLocked: The date cannot be changed once the event date has arrived.
codeLabel: Short code — guests type it at appelsin.io/e

bigScreen.title: Big screen at the event
bigScreen.desc: Turn off if photos should not be shown on a screen at the event. This changes the text in the QR pack.

moderation.title: Approve photos before they appear
moderation.desc: When this is on, you approve each photo before it shows on the photo wall and in the collection.

tiles.gallerySub: {count} uploads · share or save on iPhone
tiles.styleSub: Theme, tile layout and title overlay

timeline.heading: Timeline
timeline.capWarn: This event has reached its upload limit. New uploads are blocked until you upgrade the plan or rejected photos free up slots.
timeline.capNear: Approaching the upload limit — consider upgrading before the limit is reached.

danger.title: Delete event
danger.desc: This deletes the event and all uploaded photos. This cannot be undone.

js.deleteEventConfirmMessage: This deletes the event and all uploaded photos. This cannot be undone.
js.deletePhotoConfirmMessage: This removes the photo from the event. This cannot be undone.
